body: PT Superkrane Mitra Utama Tbk (SKRN) plans to distribute IDR 320.3 billion in interim dividends, approved by the board of directors and commissioners, with payment scheduled for December 6, 2024, to shareholders listed as of November 26, 2024. The company reported a net profit of IDR 65.4 billion in the first half of 2024 and had retained earnings of IDR 450.64 billion and total equity of IDR 853.9 billion as of September 30, 2024.
title: PT Superkrane Mitra Utama to Distribute IDR 320.3 Billion Interim Dividend to Shareholders

body: PT Satu Visi Putra Tbk (no ticker provided) has secured an additional IDR 4 billion credit facility from PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BCA), supplementing its previous IDR 10 billion working capital credit from BCA. The company, which debuted on the Indonesia Stock Exchange in February 2024 and raised IDR 73.8 billion in its IPO, reported IDR 128.92 billion in revenue and IDR 116.03 billion in net profit in Q3 2024, with cash and cash equivalents of IDR 5.84 billion as of September 30, 2024.
title: Pt Satu Visi Putra Tbk secures additional IDR 4 billion credit facility from Pt Bank Central Asia Tbk.

body: PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk (WSBP) is conducting a private placement of 178.54 million shares to convert debt from several creditors, following a peace agreement homologated by the Commercial Court of Central Jakarta District Court. This brings the total shares issued in the debt-to-equity swap to 33.6 billion shares, with the issued and paid-up capital increasing to 55.08 billion shares from 54.91 billion shares, at a conversion price of IDR 50.81 per share.
title: Waskita Beton Precast to issue 178.54 million new shares in private placement to settle debt.

body: Citi Indonesia (CITI) reported a 32% year-over-year increase in net profit at the end of September 2024, driven by operational expense efficiency, with a cost-to-income ratio improving to 41.9% from 59.8%. Despite this, the bank's credit distribution in September 2024 was IDR 30.5 trillion, significantly lower than the IDR 42.84 trillion disbursed in 9M 2023, due to challenges in long-term investment and the transfer of retail banking assets to UOB Indonesia (UOB).
title: Citi Indonesia's net profit surges 32% year-on-year despite decline in credit distribution due to operational efficiency and challenges in the banking sector.

body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO) is set to issue bonds and sukuk ijarah with a total principal amount of IDR 1.5 trillion, as part of its shelf registration public offering, aiming to raise funds up to IDR 2 trillion. The bonds and sukuk ijarah will be offered in 4 series, with the initial offering period taking place from November 12-15, 2024, and listing on the Indonesia Stock Exchange on December 16, 2024.
title: PT Petrosea to Issue IDR 1.5 Trillion Bonds and Sukuk Ijarah to Raise Funds
